lines.text: Three A.M. Your wallet buzzes. Two hundred fifty thousand dollars in ANSEM. Airdropped. Free.
You don't read the thread. You don't check the docs. You open the chart... and you reach for sell.
But your wallet is public. And crypto twitter already made a market out of you. Sixty-two percent say you dump.
You sell. The oracle reads the chain. And everyone who called it... just got paid.
Who sold? The blockchain remembers. And now the community gets paid to watch.
